prompts: /plan "in the apps/plugin project, we need the feature to monitor the fb marketplace listings. We need to monitor an open chrome tab and keep it active so it doesn't "fall asleep" and stops receiving notifications. We need to look for new messages that appear in the conversations, and then determine which item corresponds to the conversation, then we determine if it is product and conversation we need to resond to. If we respond to the conversation, we need to select the correct conversation on the page, make it the active conversation, then send the response via the conversation input controls. The page where this new script needs to run is https://www.messenger.com/marketplace/ and a sample conversation url is https://www.messenger.com/marketplace/t/24064639926523887 . The sidebar of conversations is the likely where we need to monitor for new messages appearing in any of the conversations. Here are 3 files containing HTML. the first is then entire fb marketplace conversations page, the 2nd is just the sidebar of conversations, the 3rd is just the panel of a marketplaces chat conversation with a potential lead.: - apps/plugin/docs/fb-marketplace-conversations-all.html - apps/html/docs/fb-marketplace-conversations-only.html - apps/plugin/docs/fb-marketplace-conversations-replies.html"
Change the sidepanal page name from 'Messenger Inbox Monitoring' to 'Inbox Monitoring', Change it in the dashboard page as well.

The 'Inbox Monitoring' page indicates that it 'Opens messenger.com/marketplace in a background tab. Can we show an status icon, green if it is open and red if it is not, so we can visually see what is going on. As there is a script injected into the page and we keep that page open with some kind of heartbeat or periodic message, let's make sure we update the status icon as well.
Fix the 'Open Messenger' and the 'Start Monitoring' buttons as the styles are broken. We just fixed Tailwind integration hopefully, so ensure it gets included when we compile the chrome extension.

No display of the active / inactive status of the messenger inbox monitoring. Errors with the tab, likely timing issues. : \
